commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio -n kube-system get pods -l name=nvidia-device-plugin-ds -o wide'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'POD=$(kubectl --context ohio -n kube-system get pods -l name=nvidia-device-plugin-ds -o jsonpath="{.items[0].metadata.name}"); kubectl --context ohio -n kube-system logs $POD --tail=30 2>&1'
echo --- try smoke with CDI annotation ---
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod -n efa-validation gpu-smoke-cdi --force --grace-period=0 --ignore-not-found=true 2>&1 | tail -2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pod -n efa-validation gpu-smoke-cdi -o wide'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n efa-validation gpu-smoke-cdi 2>&1 | tail -20'
